description: Task definitions for agentic-os/task-engine. Includes base app control and self-upgrade meta tasks.

tasks.description: Pull latest bridge helpers, vision, and selected app modules from gpt-desktop-apps-bridge GitHub repo. Use SkillIntegrator.
Download and integrate a new app module (e.g. browser-advanced, file-explorer) into local GrokBridgeAssets/apps and update manifests.
Read recent HUMAN_ACTION.log and SYNC_LOG, propose next primitive or skill improvement.
Open Notepad, type human-like sample text with pauses, save, close gracefully.
Use Durable-Control to perform content updates, blog edits, or site changes on Durable.co (human-like).
Navigate Chrome with tabs/scroll, perform searches or form fills, take screenshots via vision.
Basic human-like mouse movement + click + type test using BRIDGE_HELPERS (with jitter and timing).
